title: application — model relationships
description: Application + BusinessType are ROOT entities in the tenancy DAG — nothing above them, everything tenant-scoped cascades down through them.

internal.note: Actually declared on Tenant in the tenancy module; listed here because the FK target is Application.owning.

config_references.note: `tenants.business_type` is a string enum whose value resolves against the BusinessType config catalogue (`x-storage.kind: config`, keyed on `key`). NOT an Eloquent FK — no `business_type_id` column exists. The Tenant model reads `config('application.business_types')` to hydrate the catalogue entry on demand.
